lastReleaseMessage: v0.10.0: bar-raise drain (D-006 loopback bind, D-007 import/rollback strict backup-fail, error_log + logEvent, daily prune, regex hoist, analytics surface modules, dedup guard, dashboard preservation, drift-fix F1-F8); .finances/ removed from git index (D-001/D-002 enforcement)

barRaise.topFinding: The code is healthy and the chronic doc drift is finally fixed; the whole problem is that none of it is committed. The 05-31 canonical audit verified zero DESIGN/DECISIONS/CHANGELOG drift and confirmed D-001 through D-007 hold in code, but the F1-F11 fix batch plus six audit and bar-raise reports sit uncommitted, so one git checkout erases four-plus audits of work and GitHub and the dashboard still show the old state. The root cause is unchanged: seven of the eight skills CLAUDE.md names are not installed, so the audit-to-fix loop has no executor and only drains when a session hand-runs it. Bank statements still in git history and the stale dashboard audit block ride alongside.
